results.title: State Supreme Court candidates return $37K to donors with primary vote unnecessary | Washington
results.description: (The Center Square) – Two judges vying for an open Washington Supreme Court seat refunded donors roughly $37,000 after the race advanced to November without the need for an August primary vote, state records show. Five of the nine seats on the bench are up for election ahead of a ruling on the state’s new [...] The post State Supreme Court candidates return $37K to donors with primary vote unnecessary | Washington appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Inside the superintelligence that beat major hedge fund strategies and is now entering the AI race
results.description: The article explores an AI system that reportedly outperformed several hedge fund investment approaches and is now being applied to broader artificial intelligence initiatives. The development highlights growing interest in machine-driven investing and decision making.... Article link

results.title: Industrialists Seek Easier Access To Defence Import Data In Indore
results.description: Anil Kumar Rai outlined initiatives of the Ministry of Defence to boost domestic defence manufacturing, while Himanshu Prajapati highlighted Madhya Pradesh's defence manufacturing ecosystem and policy support. Air Marshal Vibhas Pande said industrialists can use the SRIJAN portal to access information on defence procurement requirements and offer their products to the department.

results.title: Delhi launches 2-week GST training programme to strengthen tax system
results.description: In a move to improve efficiency, transparency and taxpayer services, the Delhi Government has launched a comprehensive two-week training programme for officers and employees of the Trade and Taxes Department involved in Goods and Services Tax (GST) administration. The programme, being conducted in collaboration with the National Academy of Customs, Indirect Taxes and Narcotics (NACIN), [...]

results.title: Lionel Messi makes 200th international appearance during Argentina vs Algeria FIFA World Cup 2026 match
results.description: Messi is now only the third player to reach the 200-match landmark in international football, after Portugal’s Cristiano Ronaldo (228) and Kuwait’s Bader Al-Mutawa (202).

results.title: Lionel Messi becomes first player to play in six FIFA World Cups
results.description: The Argentine icon first featured in the 2006 World Cup and has featured in all subsequent editions. Messi has played 26 World Cup games, scoring 13 goals and providing eight assists.
